subject: [Pre-read] CB FP&A monthly Initiatives and Update_Apr'25

content.answer:
Hi Ian and Jianghong,

Pls find tmr's CB FP&A monthly meeting, we will be covering
1) Mar performance (added breakdown by choice, sip, and marketplace-non SIP)
2) Key Updates on

   - All BU: CB P&L Projection Accuracy Improvement Initiatives
   - Marketplace P&L: VN budget explanation
   - Marketplace P&L: Mar’25 Commission Setting Update
   - SLS: SEA Last Mile SPX comparison vs 3PL vendors

Best,

*Faye Yan*

Shopee | Cross Border

*Address:* 5 Science Park Drive, Shopee Building, Singapore 118265

content.question: Mar performance (added breakdown by choice, sip, and marketplace-non SIP)

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Slide 4

   -

   For MY/TH/VN, are these one-off or do we need to change projections for
   future months?
   -

      Topline: MY/VN platform push direction change, topline has been
      adjusted in Mar submission. FY25 ADO MY -6%, VN - 13% vs Feb
      submission
      -

      TH tax: one-off, we have officially budgeted tax impact in future
      months in the latest budget submission

Slide 5

   -

   For Local SIP, feels like we can reinvest for more growth? If we want to
   match MP at MP EBITDA level? What are next steps here?



Slide 8

   -

   Have we called out to Dhika, Anh and Pine about these issues?

heads 2) updates in CB mgmt meeting (mainly BR)

   -

   VN [Anh about to know]: Identified multiple stakeholder issue this
   cycle, will discuss in person with VN team
   -

   TH [Dhika know]: Issue has been resolved, to send out email callout and
   ensure manual error not repeated
   -

   BR [Pine Knew] : Raised issue to Pine in Feb’25:
   -

      [Inevitable] Chris direction,  has initiated dedicated email loops
      incl. Pine in for key changes
      -

      [Inevitable] Business abrupt changes: e.g. Mar’25 One-off issue of
      Anjun congestion, hence reduce 1 FSV
      -

      [Evitable] Projection Method: using MTD to project for rest of year,
      pointing out, Feb/Mar frequency has been reduced


Slide 15

   -

   CNCB Mobile Cat seems quite bad, do we know which sellers are these?
   Feels even worse than local mobile sellers


Best,

*Faye Yan*

Shopee | Cross Border

*Mobile:* +65 87767030

*Address:* 5 Science Park Drive, Shopee Building, Singapore 118265

Slide 5

Hi Ian,


Pls find the FY25 comparison btw latest projection vs Commit to Chris
version (Dec’24).

   -

   FY25 ADO: -2%,
   - *BR: +12%* from choice adjust up and MP low projection based on MTD
      performance in Dec'24, and was revised upward after recovery in
Jan/Feb'25;
      - *MY/VN: *-6% and -10% to refactor latest trends after MP PC2 and
      ABS optimization
   -

   FY25 EBITDA: +65mil (from 168mil to 233mil)
   - FY25 MP PC2: +46mil, mainly from takerate +0.9% from 1) ads take rate
      pushed up by 0.4~0.8 p.p across SEA mkts 2) commission increase for
      SG/MY/TH; netting off by CIR -0.4% (more spending): Dec’24 CIR was
      overly optimistic for TH/VN/BR, with actual spending in Feb/Mar 0.5-1%
      higher than projected
      - FY25 SLS: +7mil, despite TH -12mil from tax cost booking, BR +15mil
      due to SPX cost reduction and PH +7mil from increased SLS-marketplace
      orders due to Choice recession
      - FY25 Seller PnL: +2mil from -3.5mil to -2mil, officially require
      Choice seller PnL to breakeven FY25 from Jan cycle, hence Dec
Chris version
      is still FY25 negative PnL
      - Share Cost: +10mil from less net orders and share cost/order
      improvements


*Table: FY25 Projection Version Comparison btw Mar’25 version and Dec’24
Chris version*


Best,
